mapper.sql: id, snapshot_id, asset_id, goods_id, name, price, float_price, float_value, float_value_raw, image_url, wear_name, collection_name AS collection, rarity, category_key, filter_rarity, quality_label, tradable, raw_json
mapper.select: SELECT FROM inventory_item WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} AND category_key LIKE 'weapon!_%' ESCAPE '!' ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM inventory_item WHERE ORDER BY price DESC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS item_count, SUM(CASE WHEN tradable = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tradable_count, SUM(CASE WHEN float_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_float_count, COALESCE(SUM(price), 0) AS total_cost FROM inventory_item WHERE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO inventory_item ( snapshot_id, asset_id, goods_id, name, price, float_price, float_value, float_value_raw, image_url, wear_name, collection_name, rarity, category_key, filter_rarity, quality_label, tradable, raw_json ) VALUES
( #{item.snapshotId}, #{item.assetId}, #{item.goodsId}, #{item.name}, #{item.price}, #{item.floatPrice}, #{item.floatValue}, #{item.floatValueRaw}, #{item.imageUrl}, #{item.wearName}, #{item.collection}, #{item.rarity}, #{item.categoryKey}, #{item.filterRarity}, #{item.qualityLabel}, #{item.tradable}, #{item.rawJson} )
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_item n SET n.float_price = ( SELECT t.float_price FROM (SELECT asset_id, float_price FROM inventory_item WHERE snapshot_id = #{prevSnapshotId} AND float_price IS NOT NULL) t WHERE t.asset_id = n.asset_id LIMIT 1 ) WHERE n.snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} AND n.float_price IS NULL AND n.asset_id IN ( SELECT t2.asset_id FROM (SELECT asset_id FROM inventory_item WHERE snapshot_id = #{prevSnapshotId} AND float_price IS NOT NULL) t2 )
